name: Christopher Knight Home Ethan Tufted Bonded Leather Recliner Chair - Dark Gray: Upholstered, Hardwood Frame, Foam Fill
description: This Christopher Knight Home Ethan Tufted Bonded Leather Recliner Chair allows users to relax in style. Constructed in soft bonded leather with a tufted back, this comfortable reclining chair is great for small spaces and functions as a great place to take a nap or read a book. Its sleek style will fit in nicely with any of your existing living room furniture. Place it in your bedroom to create a quiet retreat that you can relax in after a long day. This Christopher Knight Home Ethan Tufted Bonded Leather Recliner Chair will quickly become your favorite chair.
